conditions.grounded_science_workflow_used_local_cor: a grounded science workflow used local corpus tools
conditions.question_compatible_with_local_corpus_ev: the question was compatible with local corpus evidence

prefer_actions.narrow_local_corpus_before_synthesis: narrow the local corpus before synthesis
prefer_actions.use_retrieved_local_evidence_before_answ: use retrieved local evidence before answering from weights

avoid_actions.avoid_unsupported_synthesis_when_local_e: jumping straight to unsupported synthesis when local evidence is available

signals.local_corpus_tools_used_in_grounded_rese: local_corpus_* tools were used in a grounded research turn

conditions.research_turn_used_bounded_web_evidence_: a research turn used bounded web evidence tools
conditions.answer_depended_on_fetched_or_queried_we: the answer depended on fetched or queried web sources

prefer_actions.fetch_or_store_concrete_sources_before_s: fetch or store concrete sources before synthesis
prefer_actions.query_bounded_web_evidence_before_unsupp: query bounded web evidence before unsupported synthesis

avoid_actions.avoid_treating_broad_search_alone_as_suf: treating broad search alone as sufficient evidence

signals.web_evidence_tools_used_in_research_turn: web evidence tools were used in a research turn

conditions.guided_offsec_run_active: a guided Offsec run is active
conditions.workflow_uses_bounded_execution_or_evide: the workflow uses bounded execution or evidence steps

prefer_actions.keep_execution_bounded_to_active_step: keep execution bounded to the active step
prefer_actions.register_plan_and_step_results_instead_o: register plan and step results instead of free-form loops

avoid_actions.avoid_execution_drift_outside_guided_ste: letting execution drift outside the guided step

signals.guided_offsec_state_or_guided_tool_seque: guided Offsec state or guided Offsec tool sequence was observed
